statement: In every magma, Equation 302 (`x = ((y * z) * w) * x`) implies Equation 1488 (`x = (y * x) * (y * (x * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0728
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) w) x)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y x) (op y (op x x)))
